# Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to the VRP public pilot documentation.

Please complete the checklist before requesting review.

---

## Summary

Provide a brief description of the proposed changes.

---

## Type of Change

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Example update
- [ ] Deployment guidance
- [ ] Validation documentation
- [ ] Evidence documentation
- [ ] Report template
- [ ] Script improvement
- [ ] Other

---

## Motivation

Describe why this change is needed.

---

## Related Issue

Reference the related issue if applicable.

Example:

Fixes #123

---

## Validation

Describe how the proposed changes were reviewed.

Examples:

- documentation review;
- technical review;
- example verification;
- formatting validation.

---

## Compatibility

Does this change affect existing public documentation or interfaces?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (please explain)

---

## Breaking Change

Does this introduce a breaking public change?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (please explain)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation is technically accurate.
- [ ] Public terminology is consistent.
- [ ] No protected runtime implementation has been disclosed.
- [ ] Examples remain reproducible.
- [ ] Version references are updated where applicable.
- [ ] Markdown formatting has been reviewed.

---

## Additional Notes

Provide any additional information that may assist reviewers.

---

## Confidentiality Reminder

Public pull requests must not include:

- protected runtime source code;
- proprietary algorithms;
- confidential engineering processes;
- internal authority logic;
- private implementation details.

This repository documents only the public VRP pilot boundary.
